User.title: User Profile
User.description: Store registered customer details and profile settings

uid.description: Unique Firebase Authentication UID of the customer

email.description: Verified email address of the user

Order.title: Customer Order
Order.description: Food and drink orders placed by customers

orderId.description: Unique generated identifier for the order

userId.description: UID of the user who placed this order (or 'anonymous')

items.description: List of ordered items with quantity, price, and custom names

total.description: Total checkout price in Indian Rupees (INR)

paymentMethod.description: Selected method: UPI, CARD, NETBANKING, APPLEPAY, COD

phoneNumber.description: Contact phone number for delivery or pickup

status.description: Current dispatch stage of the order

SupportQuery.title: Support Inquiry
SupportQuery.description: Contact form submissions and feedback queries from customers

message.description: Detailed body of the support query

users/{userId}.description: Access private user settings locked to authenticated master owner

orders/{orderId}.description: Browse order transactions, create checking gates for users

support_queries/{queryId}.description: Post custom contact inquiries for admin review
